title: [WIP] Disable fedora tests
body:
It looks like the fedora registry might be giving us network flakes so
we are disabling them to see if test run rates improve.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: How long are you looking to disable these?
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably b85b217) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
@baude I think we can close this, it doesn't seem to be a recurring problem
